sources.name: microsoft/d365cc-fde-internal
sources.description: Microsoft FDE (Forward Deployed Engineering) toolkit for D365 Contact Center. Production-grade parameterized JSON templates for Copilot Studio voice agents (Speech-to-Speech / streaming mode). Covers retail store routing, appointment management, pharma HCP, healthcare pharmacy, and a generic skeleton template. Templates use {{VARIABLE}} placeholders for fast customization and direct upload into Copilot Studio.
